differential_diagnoses: Thyrotoxicosis (likely Graves' disease or painless thyroiditis)
Metabolic encephalopathy (e.g., electrolyte abnormality or occult organ failure)
next_steps: Order thyroid function tests (TSH, free T4, total T3)
Order thyroid stimulating immunoglobulin (TSI) and TSH receptor antibodies (TRAb)
Send cerebrospinal fluid for autoimmune encephalitis panel (including NMDA receptor antibodies)
Consider 24-hour video EEG monitoring to rule out non-convulsive status epilepticus
Monitor thyroid hormone levels closely and consider judicious use of beta-blockers for autonomic stabilization
Consult endocrinology for management of thyrotoxicosis
